item.title: This young startup is taking on a fragrance industry that hasn’t changed in almost half a century
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: Fragrance tech company Patina announced Thursday a $2 million raise from investors, including Betaworks and True Ventures.

item.title: Maka Kids is redefining kids’ screen time with a streaming app optimized for well-being, not engagement
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: Maka Kids is building a streaming app for children ages zero to six featuring content designed for healthy development. The startup has now raised $3 million in seed funding to scale its platform.

item.title: Beauty booking startup Fresha hits $1B valuation with KKR backing
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: Beauty and wellness booking marketplace Fresha says it has raised $80 million investment from KKR’s Next Generation Technology Growth fund, KKR's growth equity arm.

item.title: General Catalyst just led a $63M bet on India’s travel payments market
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Scapia, an Indian startup that combines travel booking with co-branded credit cards and mobile payments, said the deal doubles its valuation.

item.title: Imperagen raises £5 million to use quantum physics, AI on enzyme engineering
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: Biotech company Imperagen announced on Thursday a £5 million ($6.7 million) seed round led by PXN Ventures, with participation from IQ Capital and Northern Gritstone.

item.title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

item.title: Sam Altman makes ‘mic drop’ offer to every Y Combinator startup
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Altman offered to have OpenAI invest in every single startup in this Y Combinator class: tokens for equity.

item.title: You don’t need to be an AI startup to raise. Lucra has $20M to prove it.
item.dc:creator: Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: Slapping “AI” on your startup’s pitch deck is basically table stakes right now. When a founder raised $20 million from Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest for an eSports gamification loyalty startup without those two letters in the spotlight, it got us wondering how the conversation even started — especially when ARK had already been burned by a company operating in the same space.  On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Julie […]

item.title: OpenAI barrels toward IPO that may happen in September
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership, and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.

item.title: How Lucra raised $20M as an eSports play when every VC only wants AI
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort, Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: Slapping “AI” on your startup’s pitch deck is basically table stakes right now. When a founder raised $20 million from Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest for an eSports gamification loyalty startup without those two letters in the spotlight, it got us wondering how the conversation even started — especially when ARK had already been burned by a company operating in the same space.  On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Julie […]

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in 1 week: Window to nominate and apply for the most promising startups closes May 27
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27. Pitch at TechCrunch Disrupt, get investor access, win $100K, plus more scaling perks. Nominate an early-stage founder or submit your startup today.

item.title: NanoClaw creator turns down $20M buyout offer, raises $12M seed instead
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: NanoClaw was created as a secure alternative to OpenClaw to assist the Cohen brothers with their AI marketing firm that used agents to do much of the work. But instead of running directly on a computer, NanoClaw runs sandboxed in a container.

item.title: This startup raised $43M to build a hive mind for ships
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: The Arlington, Virginia-based startup has raised $42 million to equip ships with sensors that blow the current AIS tech out of the water.

item.title: From teen hacker to Iron Dome researcher, this founder raised $28M to fight AI phishing
item.dc:creator: Marina Temkin
item.description: Ocean, an agentic email security platform, claims its AI can thoroughly analyze the context of every incoming email to detect fraud and impersonation attempts.

item.title: Forget the feed: Status AI raises $17M to turn social media into interactive entertainment
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: “Status is built on the premise that the next generation doesn’t want to watch stories,” CEO and co-founder Fai Nur said. “They want to engage with the stories and even live inside them.”

item.title: ‘Survivor’ stars Kyle Fraser and Kamilla Karthigesu introduce a goal-tracking app, Paprclip
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: A new app from "Survivor" season 48 winner Kyle Fraser and castmate Kamilla Karthigesu aims to turn goal tracking into a social experience, pairing users for accountability, daily challenges, and shared progress clips.

item.title: Stilta raises $10.5M from a16z and YC to help companies rediscover the patents they forgot they had
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: Stilta is an AI platform designed to automate the research and analytical work behind intellectual property cases — the kind of labor-intensive work that has historically made patent litigation slow and expensive.

item.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
item.dc:creator: Kate Park
item.description: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it — could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

item.title: The haves and have-nots of the AI gold rush
item.dc:creator: Anthony Ha
item.description: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

item.title: Marketing operating system Nectar Social raises $30M Series A led by Menlo
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: AI-powered marketing platform Nectar Social announced Thursday that it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created alongside Anthropic.
